meta.title: Hireest — Run your job search like a product
meta.description: Import your LinkedIn resume as PDF, export in multiple formats, build ATS-friendly resumes with AI help, manage vacancies, and get insights—all with advanced opportunity organization in one workspace.

hero.headline: The calmest way to pursue your next role.
hero.subhead: Bring your LinkedIn resume in as a PDF, keep one structured profile, export in the formats recruiters expect, and run vacancies with insights and advanced organization—without losing the thread.

problem.title: Sound familiar?
problem.intro: Ten tabs open and it still feels like chaos? It isn’t just messy files—you miss follow-ups and send weaker applications.

scenarios.title: Links and notes evaporate
scenarios.body: You saved a posting in chat, half the JD in a doc, and the recruiter thread in email—then you cannot find any of it on Monday.

scenarios.title: Your resume drifts from reality
scenarios.body: You tweak a PDF for each role while your real skills, dates, and wins live somewhere else—so every edit risks inconsistency.

scenarios.title: You don’t see the whole process
scenarios.body: You know you are busy, but not which opportunities actually deserve a push this week—so effort spreads thin instead of compounding.

steps.title: How Hireest fits your week
steps.subtitle: Three moves. One system. Less mental load.

items.title: Capture every opportunity once
items.body: Log companies, roles, links, compensation hints, and stage in a table or Kanban—advanced filters and search keep status visible, not buried in inboxes.

items.title: Build CV copy you reuse
items.body: Start from a LinkedIn PDF import when you want speed, then refine work history, certifications, skills, and languages into CV copy that powers every export format.

items.title: Review and decide with confidence
items.body: Use insights on pipeline health and priorities, then open the assistant when you want wording, prioritization, or a second opinion—without leaving the board.

cta_mid.title: Give your next application a home base
cta_mid.body: Start free today. Bring your real pipeline when you are ready—no new habits required beyond one workspace.

pillars.title: Why serious job seekers choose Hireest

workspace.title: One private workspace
workspace.body: Companies, roles, skills, and history stay organized under your account—ready for resumes and applications without scattered spreadsheets.

global.title: Built for a global market
global.body: Interface in multiple languages and resume output tuned for how you apply—whether you interview across borders or close to home.

ats.title: ATS-ready, AI-sharpened resumes
ats.body: Generate layouts parsers understand, keep keywords honest, and let AI polish phrasing—without breaking the structure that feeds every export.

rows.chaos: You retype LinkedIn into yet another tool
rows.hireest: Import your LinkedIn resume PDF and map it into structured profile data

rows.chaos: One brittle PDF for every channel
rows.hireest: Export resumes in multiple formats from the same living source
ATS-friendly generation with AI help—readable by parsers and humans

rows.chaos: Tabs for every vacancy, zero roll-up
rows.hireest: Vacancy management plus advanced opportunity views—table, Kanban, filters, search

features.title: Six fronts to run your search with intent—from PDF import to this week’s priorities
features.subtitle: Six capabilities that turn scattered files into a pipeline you can ship: import, structure, export, manage, analyze, and organize—without starting from zero every Monday.

linkedin_pdf.title: LinkedIn resume import (PDF)
linkedin_pdf.desc: Drop in the PDF you already export from LinkedIn to kick off your profile—roles, dates, and bullets mapped into structured blocks you can trust and refine.

export_formats.title: Export resumes in multiple formats
export_formats.desc: Ship the same truth as PDF, Markdown, and other outputs recruiters and systems expect—no duplicate files that drift out of sync.

ats_resume.title: ATS-friendly resumes, AI-ready polish
ats_resume.desc: Layouts and headings parsers understand, honest keyword coverage, and AI-assisted phrasing so you stay readable to software and humans alike.

opportunities.title: Vacancy and opportunity management
opportunities.desc: Track postings end to end—links, compensation, stage, owners, and history—so every vacancy has a home instead of a lost browser tab.

insights.title: Insights that surface better moves
insights.desc: See where your pipeline is healthy, stalled, or overheated so you spend time on opportunities that actually deserve a push this week.

advanced_org.title: Advanced opportunity organization
advanced_org.desc: Switch between dense tables and Kanban, combine filters and search, and keep custom views without spreadsheet chaos.

assistant_section.title: AI that reads the posting alongside your resume
assistant_section.intro: Sharpen bullets, match tone to the role, and pick what deserves follow-up—suggestions grounded in the opportunity on screen and your structured profile, not a blank chat thread and guesswork.
bullets: Stress-test which vacancies deserve follow-up using pipeline insights—not gut feel alone
Tune ATS-friendly wording while keeping blocks tied to your structured profile
Compare export formats before you send so every channel matches the same facts

testimonials.title: Stories from our users
testimonials.subtitle: Notes from folks who run applications, resumes, and follow-ups from one workspace—not ten browser tabs.

items.quote: I used to keep one tab per company and miss reply windows. With Kanban and a visible pipeline, I know exactly where to push each process this week.
items.name: Ana Paula M.

items.quote: I imported my LinkedIn PDF, fixed the fields once, and export PDF and Markdown without drift. Less rework and more consistency across applications.
items.name: Ricardo S.

items.quote: Pipeline insights show what is stable or stuck before I even open email. The assistant helps polish copy without leaving the opportunity screen.
items.name: Mariana L.

faq.title: Questions, answered
faq.subtitle: Straight answers about the product, your account, and your data.

faq_items.a: Hireest helps you run an organized job search: structured resumes with LinkedIn PDF import, vacancy tracking in table and Kanban views, multi-format exports, and insights across your applications. You sign in and use it as a living product—we keep shipping improvements over time.
Your information is tied to your authenticated account and handled according to our Privacy Policy—including purpose, retention, and your rights.

faq_items.q: Can I import my LinkedIn resume as a PDF?
faq_items.a: Yes. Bring in the PDF you already export from LinkedIn, review the mapped fields, and treat it as one source for edits and exports—without retyping everything elsewhere.

faq_items.q: Can I use Kanban and the table together?
faq_items.a: Yes. They are two views on the same opportunities—you choose density for review or columns for motion without duplicating entries.
The interface is available in English, Portuguese (Brazil), and Spanish. Resumes can carry a preferred language field so outputs align with how you apply.

faq_items.q: Do I need a credit card to get started?
faq_items.a: No. You can create an account without a card. If paid plans or limits are introduced later, we will explain them clearly before charging anything.

Experiences, certifications, education, and skills are first-class records linked into resumes. You compile ATS-friendly outputs and multi-format exports from that model—not from scattered copy-and-paste.
People who run an active search like a project: multiple companies, parallel stages, and reusable career data—not a single static PDF and a hope folder.

cta.title: Ready to hire yourself—with less chaos?
cta.body: Join in minutes. No credit card to get started—grow at your own pace when it makes sense.
